allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Phase 1 - Project Setup & Infrastructure

- Monorepo setup with pnpm workspaces
- @l-bridge/shared: Types and Zod validation schemas
- @l-bridge/api: Fastify backend with Redis, health check, bridge routes
- @l-bridge/liff: React LIFF bridge app with hooks and components

Security:
- Input validation with Zod on all endpoints
- Rate limiting with @fastify/rate-limit
- Security headers with @fastify/helmet
- Redis TLS enforcement in production

Testing:
- 70 tests passing \(19 shared, 24 api, 27 liff\)
- TDD methodology followed
- No security vulnerabilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
